sidebar_label: "Re-deliver the webhook delivery items of an app"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Re-deliver the webhook delivery items of an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/outgoing-webhooks/{app-webhook-slug}/delivery-items/{webhook-delivery-item-slug}/redeliver"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Re-deliver the delivery item of a specified webhook of a <NT>Bitrise</NT> application
